code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut ok = true
  while i < n / 2
    let a = string.byte_at(s, i)
    let b = string.byte_at(s, n - 1 - i)
    match a
    when Some(av)
      match b
      when Some(bv)
        if av != bv
          ok = false
        end
      when None
        ok = false
      end
    when None
      ok = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if ok
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
when None
  println("YES")
end
